title: Info dump: Some Important Models for Health and Fitness
summary: Info dump: Some Important Models for Health and Fitness
whyItMatters: This is a synthesis of many facts I've learned over the last few years, mainly about metabolism and exercise, [1] that have helped me become much healthier, and might help you. It’s focused mainly on “basic” models that, in my opinion, high school health class ought to cover (though mine emphatically did not). Because of various personality diso ... traits…
